task_completion.description: Create an enclosed back-of-house utility room with at least two partition walls and one door.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan view, at least two new partition walls forming an enclosed space, with at least one door object placed intersecting the walls.

task_completion.description: Define at least four named functional zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least four distinct room areas defined in the 2D plan, each with a visible text label (e.g., 'Wash Floor', 'Lounge', 'Utility', 'Folding').

task_completion.description: Incorporate a high-density equipment bank of at least 20 large appliances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large grouping of at least 20 washing machines, dryers, or similar large commercial appliances visible in the 2D plan and/or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Create a customer folding and waiting area with at least four tables and eight seating items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An area in the layout containing at least 4 table objects and at least 8 seating objects (chairs, benches, sofas) visible in the 2D plan or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Add at least two dimension lines annotating aisle clearances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least two dimension lines (lines with measurement text) drawn on the 2D plan, specifically measuring the distance between equipment banks, walls, or aisles.
The application window title bar shows 'laundromat.sh3d' or a save dialog confirms the file is being saved to the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to design the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sweet Home 3D application interface being actively used (tools selected, items dragged from catalog), rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying XML directly.

integrity.description: The agent built the layout incrementally rather than copying a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows a progression of adding walls, then furniture, then dimensions over multiple steps, rather than the final layout appearing instantly.

integrity.description: The 3D view accurately reflects the 2D plan additions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bottom 3D view pane in Sweet Home 3D updates to show the 3D models of the appliances, tables, chairs, and walls placed in the 2D plan.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying 'laundromat_starter.sh3d' and saving as 'laundromat.sh3d' in /home/ga/Documents/. To receive full points (100), the layout must explicitly contain: >=2 new walls, >=1 door, >=4 defined rooms with names, >=20 large appliances, >=4 tables, >=8 seats, and >=2 dimension lines. The pass threshold is 70 points.
